Tennis gestures 🎾🎾🎾.

Been a while since the last time I posted some rough sketches, but I feel like showing them because that’s where it all starts. My sketchbook is my most important tool. It’s where I draw with the most freedom. No pressure to “finish” anything, I just focus on the process and on applying energy and expression to my drawings. 

Can you name any of these pros?

Learn how to draw more dynamic poses by joining my Patreon!

#tennisart #dynamicposes #sketchbooktour

Workshop presencial en Bogotá! ✏️✏️✏️

Gente! Estaré dando un workshop presencial este 21 y 22 de febrero de 2026 en diseño y animación de personajes, con una presentación virtual el 16 de febrero.

Si ilustras, animas o simplemente te gusta dibujar, este workshop es para ti:

👉 9 horas de entrenamiento en donde aprenderás a:

🔹 Diseñar un personaje completo desde el concepto hasta el modelo final.
🔹 Crear una “character sheet” como se haría en un proyecto real de animación.
🔹 Aplicar técnicas básicas de animación.
🔹 Animar un ciclo de marcha (o walk-cycle) con tu personaje en Procreate Dreams (necesitarás un iPad con la app instalada) - aunque también puedes usar otras tablets con apps gratuitas de animación. 

👀 Además de esto habrá snacks, bebidas, espacio para charlar y hacer networking y una presentación final de todos los proyectos!

Quieres pasar un finde dibujando y aprendiendo? 

📍Cl. 85 con Cra. 19. Bogotá.
🎚️ Nivel intermedio.
🔧 Trabajaremos en iPad o Tablet de dibujo.

Cupos Limitados!

Escribe “WORKSHOP” en los comentarios y te mandaré toda la info por DM. 

#artebogota #diseñodepersonajes #tallerdeanimación #procreateworkshop

Starting the year as I mean to go on @parimatch

I’ve just updated my InPrnt page with some old and new prints! 🙌. 

⚽️🏀⚾️

As you may know for the past couple years I’ve been focusing on athletes as my primary subject. I have now over 30 illustrations about sports. It all just started as a passion project and now it’s basically what I do for a living. Your support means I get to keep doing it. Consider supporting my work by purchasing my prints, joining my Patreon or even commissioning me a project 😌. The industry hasn’t been the best lately so I’ve been relying on these 3 things to keep me going. Each and every one of you that has supported my art has kept me going through rough times, so I owe you all my gratitude!

Check out my print shop on @inprnt following the link in my profile. 

Cheers!

#freelanceillustrator #illustrationwork #dynamicposes #nflart #tennisart

Quick drawing of today after hearing the news. Tried to use some spiderverse tricks such as halftones and aberration. Hope you like it!

I had the honor of creating this illustration for Olympic Artistic Swimmer and World Champion, @iristiocasas ❤️‍🔥🏊‍♀️.

Such an amazing commission to work on! I tried to capture her expressiveness through the water, carrying over the energy of her tremendous performances! 🌊🌊🌊

I hope you like this piece! And thank you @rickyes7 for commissioning the piece!

#artisticswimming #swimming #olympicswimming #olympicathlete #illustrationnow #digitalartworks
